$references.$comment: This technical specification file (TS) is hereby considered right over the European standard one (EN); meaning that for any difference that may be present between those files this schema will prefer what is defined in the technical specification
$references.name: CDD TS 102 894-2

timestamp.description: Unit: millisecond. The timestamp when the message was generated since Unix Epoch (1970/01/01).

protocol_version.description: version of the ITS message and/or communication protocol

generation_delta_time.description: time of the reference position in the CAM, considered as time of the CAM generation. TimestampIts mod 65 536. TimestampIts represents an integer value in milliseconds since 2004-01-01T00:00:00:000Z. oneMilliSec(1)

semi_major_orientation.description: wgs84North(0), wgs84East(900), wgs84South(1800), wgs84West(2700), doNotUse(3600), unavailable(3601)

basic_vehicle_container_high_frequency.description: Detaild information of the Basic Vehicle Container High Frequency.

drive_direction.description: The vehicle drive direction (forward or backward) of the originating ITS-S. forward (0), backward (1), unavailable (2).

vehicle_width.description: The Vehicle Width of the vehicle ITS-S that originates the CAM excluding side mirrors and possible similar extensions.

curvature_calculation_mode.description: Whether vehicle yaw-rate is used in the calculation of the curvature of the vehicle ITS-S that originates the CAM. yawRateUsed (0), yawRateNotUsed (1), unavailable (2).

acceleration_control.description: An optional component which represents the current status of the vehcile mechnanisms controlling the longitudinal movement of the vehcile ITS-S (e.g. brake pedal,  gas pedal, etc. engaged) that originate the CAM.

brake_pedal_engaged.description: indicates whether the brake pedal is engaged or not

gas_pedal_engaged.description: indicates whether the gas pedal is engaged or not

emergency_brake_engaged.description: indicates whether the emergency brake is engaged or not

collision_warning_engaged.description: indicates whether the collision warning system is engaged or not

acc_engaged.description: indicates whether the ACC system is engaged or not

cruise_control_engaged.description: indicates whether the cruise control system is engaged or not

speed_limiter_engaged.description: indicates whether the speed limiter system is engaged or not

lane_position.description: An optional component which represents the lanePosition of the referencePosition of a vehicle. offTheRoad (-1), innerHardShoulder (0), outerHardShoulder (14).

performance_class.description: An optional component characterizes the maximum age of the CAM data elements with regard to the generation delta time.

cen_dsrc_tolling_zone.description: An optional component which represents the information about the position of a CEN DSRC Tolling Station operating in the 5,8 GHz frequency band.

cen_dsrc_tolling_zone_id.description: id of a protected communication zone

rsu_container_high_frequency.description: The basic RSU container high frequency

protected_communication_zones_rsu.description: the path history, a path with a set of path points

expiry_time.description: Unit: millisecond. The number of elapsed milliseconds since the ITS epoch (2004/01/01).

protected_zone_radius.description: Unit: m. radius of protected communication zone

protected_zone_id.description: id of a protected communication zone

basic_vehicle_container_low_frequency.description: The basic vehicle container low frequency

vehicle_role.description: default(0), publicTransport(1), specialTransport(2), dangerousGoods(3), roadWork(4), rescue(5), emergency(6), safetyCar(7), agriculture(8),commercial(9),military(10),roadOperator(11),taxi(12), reserved1(13), reserved2(14), reserved3(15)

exterior_lights.description: Status of the exterior light switches represented as a bit string: lowBeamHeadlightsOn(0), highBeamHeadlightsOn(1), leftTurnSignalOn(2), rightTurnSignalOn(3), daytimeRunningLightsOn(4), reverseLightOn(5), fogLightOn(6), parkingLightsOn(7)

path_history.description: the path history, a path with a set of path points

path_position.description: offset position of a detected event point with regards to the previous detected event point (reference_position).

path_delta_time.description: time travelled by the detecting ITS-S since the previous detected event point (generation_delta_time). tenMilliSecondsInPast(1)

public_transport_container.description: detailed information of the Public Transport Container

embarkation_status.description: indicates whether a vehicle (e.g. public transport vehicle, truck) is under the embarkation process. If that is the case, the value is true, otherwise false

pt_activation.description: activation data for real-time systems designed for operations control

pt_activation-type.description: Coding type of the pt_activation_data data: undefinedCodingType(0), r09-16CodingType(1), vdv-50149CodingType(2), reserved for alternative and future use (3-255)

pt_activation_data.description: used for various tasks in the public transportation environment

special_transport_container.description: detailed information of the Special Transport Container

special_transport_type.description: indicates if a vehicle is carrying goods in the special transport conditions as a bit string: heavyLoad(0), excessWidth(1), excessLength(2), excessHeight(3)

light_bar_siren_in_use.description: indicates the status of light bar and any sort of audible alarm system besides the horn as a bit string: lightBarActivated(0), sirenActivated(1)

dangerous_goods_container.description: detailed information of the Dangerous Goods Container

dangerous_goods_basic.description: indicates the type of the dangerous goods being carried by a heavy vehicle: explosives1(0), explosives2(1), explosives3(2), explosives4(3), explosives5(4), explosives6(5), flammableGases(6), nonFlammableGases(7), toxicGases(8), flammableLiquids(9), flammableSolids(10), substancesLiableToSpontaneousCombustion(11), substancesEmittingFlammableGasesUponContactWithWater(12), oxidizingSubstances(13), organicPeroxides(14), toxicSubstances(15), infectiousSubstances(16), radioactiveMaterial(17), corrosiveSubstances(18), miscellaneousDangerousSubstances(19)

road_works_container_basic.description: detailed information of the Road Works Container

road_works_sub_cause_code.description: unavailable(0), majorRoadworks(1),roadMarkingWork(2), slowMovingRoadMaintenance(3), shortTermStationaryRoadworks(4), streetCleaning(5), winterService(6), reserved for future usage (7-255)

light_bar_siren_in_use.description: indicates the status of light bar and any sort of audible alarm system besides the horn as a bit string: lightBarActivated(0), sirenActivated(1)

closed_lanes.description: indicates the opening/closure status of the lanes of a carriageway.

inner_hard_shoulder_status.description: indicates the current status of a hard shoulder: whether it is available for special usage: availableForStopping(0), closed(1), availableForDriving(2)

outer_hard_shoulder_status.description: indicates the current status of a hard shoulder: whether it is available for special usage: availableForStopping(0), closed(1), availableForDriving(2)

driving_lane_status.description: indicates whether a driving lane is open to traffic as a bit string. A lane is counted from inside border of the road excluding the hard shoulder. The size of the bit string shall correspond to the total number of the driving lanes in the carriageway

rescue_container.description: detailed information of the Rescue Container

light_bar_siren_in_use.description: indicates the status of light bar and any sort of audible alarm system besides the horn as a bit string: lightBarActivated(0), sirenActivated(1)

emergency_container.description: detailed information of the Rescue Container

light_bar_siren_in_use.description: indicates the status of light bar and any sort of audible alarm system besides the horn as a bit string: lightBarActivated(0), sirenActivated(1)

incident_indication.description: the optional incident related to the roadworks to provide additional information of the roadworks zone.

cc_and_scc.description: reserved for future use(0), trafficCondition(1), accident(2), roadworks(3), reserved for future usage(4), impassability(5), adverseWeatherCondition-Adhesion(6), aquaplaning(7), reserved for future usage(8),hazardousLocation-SurfaceCondition(9), hazardousLocation-ObstacleOnTheRoad(10), hazardousLocation-AnimalOnTheRoad(11), humanPresenceOnTheRoad(12), reserved for future usage(13), wrongWayDriving(14), rescueAndRecoveryWorkInProgress(15), reserved for future usage(16), adverseWeatherCondition-ExtremeWeatherCondition(17), adverseWeatherCondition-Visibility(18), adverseWeatherCondition-Precipitation(19), violence(20), reserved for future usage(21-25), slowVehicle(26), dangerousEndOfQueue(27), reserved for future usage(28-90), vehicleBreakdown(91), postCrash(92), humanProblem(93), stationaryVehicle(94), emergencyVehicleApproaching(95), hazardousLocation-DangerousCurve(96), collisionRisk(97), signalViolation(98), dangerousSituation(99), railwayLevelCrossing(100), reserved for future usage(101-255)

emergency_priority.description: indicates the right of priority requested or assumed by an operating emergency vehicle as a bit string: requestForRightOfWay(0), requestForFreeCrossingAtATrafficLight(1)

safety_car_container.description: detailed information of the Safety Car Container

light_bar_siren_in_use.description: indicates the status of light bar and any sort of audible alarm system besides the horn as a bit string: lightBarActivated(0), sirenActivated(1)

incident_indication.description: the optional incident related to the roadworks to provide additional information of the roadworks zone

cc_and_scc.description: reserved for future use(0), trafficCondition(1), accident(2), roadworks(3), reserved for future usage(4), impassability(5), adverseWeatherCondition-Adhesion(6), aquaplaning(7), reserved for future usage(8),hazardousLocation-SurfaceCondition(9), hazardousLocation-ObstacleOnTheRoad(10), hazardousLocation-AnimalOnTheRoad(11), humanPresenceOnTheRoad(12), reserved for future usage(13), wrongWayDriving(14), rescueAndRecoveryWorkInProgress(15), reserved for future usage(16), adverseWeatherCondition-ExtremeWeatherCondition(17), adverseWeatherCondition-Visibility(18), adverseWeatherCondition-Precipitation(19), violence(20), reserved for future usage(21-25), slowVehicle(26), dangerousEndOfQueue(27), reserved for future usage(28-90), vehicleBreakdown(91), postCrash(92), humanProblem(93), stationaryVehicle(94), emergencyVehicleApproaching(95), hazardousLocation-DangerousCurve(96), collisionRisk(97), signalViolation(98), dangerousSituation(99), railwayLevelCrossing(100), reserved for future usage(101-255)

traffic_rule.description: indicates whether vehicles are allowed to overtake a safety car that is originating this CAM: noPassing(0), noPassingForTrucks(1), passToRight(2), passToLeft(3)

speed_limit.description: indicates whether a speed limit is applied to vehicles following the safety car. Unit: km/h

angle_value.description: An angle value in degrees described in the WGS84 reference system with respect to the WGS84 north.

semi_major_axis_length.description: Half of length of the major axis, i.e. distance between the centre point and major axis point of the position accuracy ellipse.

semi_minor_axis_length.description: Half of length of the minor axis, i.e. distance between the centre point and minor axis point of the position accuracy ellipse.

altitude.description: The altitude and an altitude accuracy of the geographical point.

reference_position_with_confidence.description: A position within a geographic coordinate system together with a confidence ellipse.

latitude.description: The latitude of the geographical point.

longitude.description: The longitude of the geographical point.

traffic_participant_type.description: The type of a traffic participant. unknown(0), pedestrian(1), cyclist(2), moped(3), motorcycle(4), passengerCar(5), bus(6), lightTruck(7), heavyTruck(8), trailer(9), specialVehicles(10), tram(11), roadSideUnit(15)

heading.description: The Heading in a WGS84 co-ordinates system.

heading_confidence.description: The confidence value of the heading value with a predefined confidence level.

speed.description: The speed and associated confidence value.

speed_confidence.description: The confidence value of the speed value.

vehicle_length.description: The length of vehicle and accuracy indication information.

vehicle_length_confidence_indication.description: Indication of the length value confidence. noTrailerPresent (0), trailerPresentWithKnownLength (1), trailerPresentWithUnknownLength (2), trailerPresenceIsUnknown (3), unavailable (4).

acceleration_component.description: An acceleration component along with a confidence value.

confidence.description: The confidence value of the value.

curvature.description: The curvature of the vehicle trajectory and the associated confidence value.

curvature_value.description: Detected curvature of the vehicle trajectory.

curvature_confidence.description: Along with a confidence value of the curvature value with a predefined confidence level. onePerMeter-0-00002 (0),onePerMeter-0-0001 (1),onePerMeter-0-0005 (2),onePerMeter-0-002 (3),onePerMeter-0-01 (4),onePerMeter-0-1 (5),outOfRange (6),unavailable (7).

yaw_rate.description: A yaw rate of vehicle at a point in time.

yaw_rate_value.description: Yaw rate value at a point in time.

yaw_rate_confidence.description: Confidence value associated to the yaw rate value. degSec-000-01 (0), degSec-000-05 (1), degSec-000-10 (2), degSec-001-00 (3), degSec-005-00 (4),degSec-010-00 (5),degSec-100-00 (6),outOfRange (7),unavailable (8).

steering_wheel_angle.description: The steering wheel angle of the vehicle at certain point in time.

steering_wheel_angle_confidence.description: Confidence value of the steering wheel angle value.
